name: Wheaton Precious Metals
confidenceReason: Best organic production growth profile in streaming (40% by 2029), but trailing P/E of 65x and $66.7B market cap on ~$1B earnings is demanding. Stock has doubled in 52 weeks.
bullCase: Wheaton offers the best organic production growth in the precious metals streaming space -- 40% growth by 2029, with 2026 guidance of 860-940K GEOs representing a ~28% jump. The company has a pristine balance sheet (net cash of $1.15B), 54.7% net margins, and 13%+ ROIC. With gold prices above $2,800/oz, the fixed-cost streaming model provides massive operating leverage.
bearCase: WPM trades at a trailing P/E of 65x and a market cap of $66.7B on $1B of trailing earnings -- pricing in near-flawless execution and sustained high gold prices. The stock has risen 107% in 52 weeks. FCF yield is approximately 1%, which is thin. Any gold price correction toward $2,200/oz would compress earnings significantly.
